stories.title: AAP Publishes Updated Drowning Prevention Guidelines in July 2026 Pediatrics

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The AAP just updated its drowning prevention guidelines.

Key message: "touch supervision" — one adult, arm's reach, fully focused on kids in water. No phones.

Drowning is the #1 unintentional death cause for ages 1-4.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The AAP's updated guidelines: swim lessons can start at age 1.

Why age 1 specifically? Mobility increases, so does access to water hazards.

Infant lessons before age 1: not proven to reduce drowning risk.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: The AAP Just Updated Its Drowning Prevention Guidelines. Here's What Parents Need to Know.

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
AAP Publishes Updated Drowning Prevention Guidelines in July 2026 Pediatrics

#### Image 1A — Social (1200x630)

**Scene:** A parent crouching at the edge of a bright outdoor swimming pool, one arm outstretched and almost touching a toddler in floaties who is splashing in the shallow end. The parent's full attention is on the child — no phone, no distractions.

**Subjects:** One adult (gender-neutral, mid-30s) and one toddler (approximately 2 years old) in a sunny, clean residential pool setting. Warm, sun-drenched afternoon.

**Mood:** Attentive, warm, safe. The image conveys closeness and protection without alarm or fear.

**Lighting:** Bright midday summer sun, natural light reflecting off pool water, soft shadows on the pool deck.

**Color palette:** Aqua blues and whites from the pool, warm skin tones, light concrete deck. Clean and inviting.

**Art style:** Realistic photographic style. Lifestyle and editorial tone. No graphic elements, no text, no props with brand logos.

**Bottom third:** Clear pool deck or water surface — leave this area clean and uncluttered for Canva text overlay.

---

#### Image 1B — Article Header (1200x630)

**Scene:** A wide shot of a calm outdoor swimming area with a lone floatie ring resting on the pool surface. A safety fence surrounds the pool in the background. The scene is tranquil — early morning or late afternoon light.

**Subjects:** Empty residential pool with a colorful ring floatie, four-sided pool fence visible in background, no people.

**Mood:** Calm but purposeful — a reminder of pool safety without being alarmist. Clean and editorial.

**Lighting:** Soft golden-hour light, long shadows, warm tones on the pool deck.

**Color palette:** Teal and aqua pool water, golden warm deck tones, white safety fence. Peaceful and summery.

**Art style:** Realistic photographic editorial style. Clean and uncluttered.

**Bottom third:** Still water surface or pool deck — leave this area clean for Canva text overlay.

---

stories.title: Pikes Peak First-Ever July 4 Sunset Opening — Plus Sunrise at 4 AM

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Pikes Peak opens at 4 AM tomorrow for a special July 4 sunrise.

Last entry for sunrise: 6 AM. Tickets at DrivePikesPeak.com — none at the gate.

$40 adults, $12 ages 6-15, free kids 5 and under.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Tomorrow at Pikes Peak: the first-ever July 4 sunset opening.

Gateway reopens at 7 PM. Sunset from 14,115 feet at 8:29 PM.

Advance tickets required at DrivePikesPeak.com. Capacity limited.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Pikes Peak Is Doing Something It's Never Done Before This July 4 — Here's How to Be There

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Pikes Peak First-Ever July 4 Sunset Opening — Plus Sunrise at 4 AM

#### Image 2A — Social (1200x630)

**Scene:** A dramatic sunset viewed from a high mountain summit, looking west over a vast landscape. The sky is painted in rich oranges, pinks, and deep purples. Rocky alpine terrain and the curve of the earth are visible in the foreground.

**Subjects:** No people — the focus is entirely on the sky and the landscape below as seen from a high-altitude summit. Rugged rocky outcrops in the foreground.

**Mood:** Awe-inspiring, epic, celebratory. This is a once-in-a-lifetime kind of view.

**Lighting:** Golden-hour setting sun, dramatic sky with layered cloud colors, silhouetted rocks.

**Color palette:** Deep burnt orange, coral, violet, and navy blue sky. Rocky gray and brown alpine terrain. No artificial lights.

**Art style:** Realistic photographic style, landscape/nature editorial tone.

**Bottom third:** Rocky mountain terrain or the foreground slope — leave this area clear for Canva text overlay.

---

#### Image 2B — Article Header (1200x630)

**Scene:** A family of four silhouetted against a vivid sunrise sky, standing together at a high mountain overlook. Parents and two young children are looking out at the view, one child on a parent's shoulders.

**Subjects:** Adult silhouettes with children — no identifiable faces. Open mountain vista stretching behind them, warm sunrise light ahead.

**Mood:** Wonder, adventure, togetherness. The feeling of a family sharing something extraordinary.

**Lighting:** Golden pre-dawn sunrise casting warm backlight on the silhouettes, sky transitioning from deep blue to amber and gold.

**Color palette:** Rich sunrise oranges and yellows, silhouetted dark figures, muted mountain landscape.

**Art style:** Realistic photographic silhouette style, editorial lifestyle tone.

**Bottom third:** Mountain terrain or landscape horizon — leave clear for Canva text overlay.

---

stories.title: Recall Alert — Crayola PipCubes Magnetic Building Cubes Recalled for Magnet Ingestion Hazard

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Recall: Crayola-branded PipCubes building cubes — 9,400 units at Michaels + Amazon (2025).

Loose magnets can cause serious internal injuries if swallowed.

Stop use. Free replacement: cpsc.gov

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Recall: Crayola-Branded PipCubes Magnetic Building Cubes Pulled Due to Magnet Ingestion Risk

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Recall Alert — Crayola PipCubes Magnetic Building Cubes Recalled for Magnet Ingestion Hazard

#### Image 4A — Social (1200x630)

**Scene:** Colorful magnetic building cube toy pieces scattered on a light wooden floor or white surface, seen from above. The cubes are bright and appealing — the image sets the scene of toys accessible to small children.

**Subjects:** Small colorful cube toys with visible seams or joints, arranged loosely on a clean surface. No brand markings or logos on the cubes.

**Mood:** Matter-of-fact, neutral — the image informs without alarming. Clean product-style scene.

**Lighting:** Soft even studio lighting, no harsh shadows, clean white or light wood surface.

**Color palette:** Bright primary colors (reds, blues, yellows, greens) against a clean white or natural wood background.

**Art style:** Realistic, clean product/editorial photography style. Simple and clear.

**Bottom third:** Clean floor or surface — leave clear for Canva text overlay.

stories.title: Managing July 4 When the Fireworks Are Cancelled — A COS Parent Reality Check

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
When your kid asks "but where are the FIREWORKS?" tomorrow:

COS families are trading fireworks for Pikes Peak sunsets, Switchbacks games, and free events at Banning Lewis Ranch.

We do July 4 our own way here.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Your Kid Is Going to Ask About the Fireworks. Here's What to Tell Them (and Do Instead).

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Managing July 4 When the Fireworks Are Cancelled — A COS Parent Reality Check

#### Image 5A — Social (1200x630)

**Scene:** A parent and child sitting together on a blanket on a grassy hillside, looking up at a clear evening sky — no fireworks, just stars beginning to emerge. The child is pointing up and the parent is smiling. A thermos and snack bag are nearby.

**Subjects:** One adult and one child (approximately 5–8 years old), casual summer clothing, relaxed backyard or park hillside setting. Evening light, comfortable and cozy.

**Mood:** Warm and humorous — finding the joy in an unexpected July 4. Relatable parenting moment without being sad or disappointed.

**Lighting:** Soft dusk light, warm golden tones fading to the first deep blue of evening sky.

**Color palette:** Warm amber and gold evening light, deep blue sky, green grass, neutral clothing tones.

**Art style:** Realistic lifestyle photographic style, warm editorial tone.

**Bottom third:** Grass or blanket edge — leave clear for Canva text overlay.
